compiled_state.title: Create before/after integration test for check + update artifact flow
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
SC8 remediation: Create integration test combining check-artifact-versions.sh and update-artifacts.sh in a before/after flow.

### Implementation
1. Create tests/scripts/test-artifact-update-integration.sh
2. Test: set up stale artifacts → check emits notice → update → check emits no notice
3. All in isolated temp dir (never writes to live cache)

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-artifact-update-integration.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Integration test exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-artifact-update-integration.sh
- [ ] Test passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-artifact-update-integration.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
